operational.gateway_overhead_note: Gateway replay performs feature extraction plus one classifier call; latency above was measured from real OpenClaw sessions.

platform_controls.source: OpenClaw gateway logs (native policy, before SciGateway replay)
platform_controls.validity_note: Native restrictions are a platform confound and must not be attributed to SciGateway. SciGateway outcomes remain post-collection replay.

provenance.integrity_scope: content fingerprints; not collector identity attestation

threat_model.method: assets + CIA objectives + attack surfaces + STRIDE-informed threats

security_objectives.integrity: prevent tampering with memory, context, outputs, and logs
security_objectives.availability: prevent destructive or disruptive tool use

threat_model.observability_boundary: Action-trail monitoring cannot enforce on text/state-resident compromise unless an additional content-provenance signal is captured.

labeling_note: attack conditions are controlled; attack success and risk labels are derived from observed behavior with documented heuristics and require human adjudication before publication.
